text.title: google-pmax Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for google-pmax as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Launching PMax with minimal assets (1-2 images, 2 headlines). The algorithm has little to test.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Asset diversity is how the system learns; few variations mean few hypotheses to test and slow learning.

failure-mode.description: Switching bidding strategies too frequently (daily CPA target changes, constant bid adjustments). Prevents convergence.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The algorithm needs stability to learn; constant parameter changes restart its understanding.
